---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem with Chroma
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / clip
If applicable, add screenshots or a short clip. Chroma is a visual Hierarchy tool, so this helps a lot.

## Environment
- Unity version: [e.g. 2021.3.40f1, Unity 6]
- Chroma version / commit: [e.g. v0.1.0]
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14]

## Additional context
Add any other context about the problem here (console errors, custom rules in use, etc.).
